title: SSID Convergence Manifest
description: Schema for convergence scan manifests produced by the SoT convergence scanner. Each manifest captures the compliance state of a single repository against the active convergence contract.

repo_name.description: Canonical repository name (e.g. SSID, SSID-open-core, SSID-docs).

repo_role.description: Role of the repository in the SSID ecosystem.

scan_time_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the convergence scan.

contract_path.description: Repo-relative path to the convergence contract used for this scan.

contract_version.description: Semantic version of the convergence contract.

contract_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the convergence contract file at scan time.

rule_count.description: Total number of rules evaluated during the scan.

expected_artifacts.description: List of artifact paths that the contract requires for this repo.

actual_artifacts.description: List of artifact paths actually found in the repository.

missing_artifacts.description: List of required artifact paths that are absent.

drift_findings.description: Drift findings detected during the convergence scan.

blocked_operations.description: Operations that are blocked due to convergence violations.

export_ready.description: Whether the repository is ready for export to derivative repos.

status.description: Overall convergence status of the scanned repository.

path.description: File or directory path related to the drift finding.

detail.description: Human-readable description of the drift finding.

severity.description: Severity level of the drift finding.
